# Cloudflare One Migrations

Plans migrations from Zscaler ZIA/ZPA, Palo Alto, legacy VPN, SWG, or SASE stacks to Cloudflare One.

## Install

```sh
npx github:Elvis020/hey-skills add cloudflare-one-migrations --to ./skills
```
